John Constable

by John Constable
England · 1795 · Pen and black ink and brush and black ink and gray wash on cream wove paper

by John Constable

Binfield Rectory and Church, Berkshire
by John Constable
England · 1816 · Graphite on ivory wove paper
The Hay Wain
by John Constable
English Romanticism · 1821
A farm cart in a shallow stream on a summer afternoon. Nothing is happening. Constable turned rural quiet into monumental painting.
An Old Bridge at Salisbury
by John Constable
England · 1826 · Etching on ivory China paper
Branch Hill Pond, Hampstead
by John Constable
England, 19th century · 1828 · oil on canvas

by John Constable
England · 19th century · 1836 · Oil on canvas
